_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of key concepts in security management (e.g., Release Management, Patch Management).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of software version control concepts and Git workflows, including branching strategies, merge and rebase operations, conflict resolution, pull request processes, and collaborative development practices.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-K-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-012 (SP, cosine: 0.527), DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.514).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.8/10 (raw 0.378). Shared vocabulary: [concepts, knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [key, management, patch, release, security] vs WIDAI-only terms [branching, collaborative, conflict, control, development, git] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.877 (P=0.883, R=0.872). Balanced P/R — the 12-word DCWF element and 25-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:1.1%, N:67.9%, C:31.0%). No dominant classification for "Knowledge of key concepts in security management (e.g., Release Management, Patc" vs "Knowledge of software version control concepts and Git workflows, including bran" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.556 > STS 0.378 (gap +0.178). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [concepts, knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.7%. Shared tokens: [concepts, knowledge]. DCWF-only: [key, management, patch, release, security]. WIDAI-only: [branching, collaborative, conflict, control, development, git].
